name: Beef & Lentil Stew
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Mushroom Stems and Pieces (1 Cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the meat, onion, and garlic in a Dutch oven until the meat is brown.
2. Drain off any excess fat.
3. Stir in the undrained mushrooms and remaining ingredients.
4. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until lentils are tender (about 40 minutes).
5. Remove bay leaf and serve.
